items.title: Officer on horseback chases suspect through New York streets
items.dek: The suspect was accused of purse-snatching and has been charged with larceny and providing false information.
items.body: The suspect was accused of purse-snatching and has been charged with larceny and providing false information.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
items.dek: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.
items.body: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kanye West concert in Poland cancelled over antisemitic comments
items.dek: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.
items.body: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.
items.author: IriLine Desk
